title: Command Center passive UI observations proof
description: Fresh PR-complete proof for Recipe v1 passive observations on the Command Center CDP/gateway path.

pre_conditions.description: Command Center sandbox UI is serving the target route.
Chrome CDP session is available for UI recipe playback.
Sandbox gateway is reachable for the Command Center session.

assert-observer-manifest.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('docs/examples/recipes/farmslot-v1.action-manifest.json','utf8')); const refs=new Set((manifest.observers||[]).map((entry)=>entry.ref)); if(!refs.has('ui.screen')||!refs.has('ui.visible')) { console.error('missing ui.screen/ui.visible observer declarations'); process.exit(1); }"
assert-observer-manifest.intent: Verify the action manifest advertises ui.screen and ui.visible observers.

open-dev-dispatch.intent: Open the Command Center dispatch dev harness through CDP.

wait-dev-dispatch.intent: Verify the Command Center route is visible before pressing navigation targets.

before-command-center-observations.label: Before Command Center passive observation presses
before-command-center-observations.intent: Capture the visible Command Center harness before observation policy checks.

press-default-observe.intent: Press a visible link with default passive ui.screen and ui.visible observations.

wait-ready-workspace.intent: Verify the default-observe press followed normal control flow.

open-dev-dispatch-again.intent: Return to the dispatch harness for selected-observer proof.

press-visible-only.intent: Press a visible link while requesting only the ui.visible observer.

wait-review-workspace.intent: Verify selected-observer press followed normal control flow.

open-dev-dispatch-final.intent: Return to the dispatch harness for observe:false proof.

press-observe-false.intent: Press a visible link with passive observations disabled for this node.

wait-runs.intent: Verify observe:false did not alter normal action control flow.

after-command-center-observations.label: After Command Center passive observation presses
after-command-center-observations.intent: Capture the Command Center UI after the observation policy checks.
